Product Details
Glyd Rings / Step Seals

Engineered low-friction sealing solutions for hydraulic pistons and rods in demanding reciprocating systems.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Glyd Rings / Step Seals

A practical choice for hydraulic actuators that need low friction, smooth reciprocating motion, and dependable sealing efficiency.

Glyd Rings and Step Seals are PTFE-based engineered sealing solutions used in hydraulic piston and rod positions where low friction, reduced stick-slip, and stable sealing performance are required.

Low-Friction Sealing

Helps reduce stick-slip and breakout force in hydraulic cylinder applications.

Piston / Rod Applications

Suitable for reciprocating piston and rod sealing positions in precision hydraulic assemblies.

Engineered Performance

The sealing structure supports reliable service life, wear resistance, and smooth motion in demanding hydraulic equipment.
